options.text: How can we be sure that the results are applicable to different age groups?
What's the point of doing research if it doesn't affect our daily lives?
Can you explain the methodology behind the study?
Why are you focusing on high school students only?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案opt_1是质疑研究的实际应用价值的合适问题，其他选项虽然语法正确但不符合该场景的需求。
content.scenarioHint: 教授或同行提出质疑，学生需回答

options.text: This seems super niche—how’s this useful in real classrooms?
你觉得这个研究有多重要?
你能告诉我这个研究的结论吗?

content.explanation: 正确答案"This seems super niche—how’s this useful in real classrooms?"直接质疑研究的实际应用价值，表现出对课堂应用的关注。其他选项虽然表达了对研究的兴趣，但并未直接回答质疑的核心问题
content.scenarioHint: 教授或同行提出质疑，学生需回答

options.text: It’s just a model—no one can implement it in real life.
It’s been used in 5 community colleges with improved student participation rates.
Maybe if you had better funding, it would work.
We haven’t thought about real-world use yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案用具体���施案例回应质疑，体现实践价值。选项1和4是消极否认，选项2是合理回应，选项3是归咎外部条件，不符合'避免防御性回应'的原则。
content.speakerText: This intervention sounds too theoretical—has anyone actually tried it outside the lab?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个干预措施听起来太理论化了——有人在实验室之外试过吗？
